_note: Curated remediation guidance per ScoutSuite finding rule. Validated fail-closed against aws.rules.txt. References are canonical AWS documentation roots.

iam-root-account-with-active-keys.json.summary: Delete the root account's access keys and use IAM roles/users instead.
steps: In IAM > My security credentials, delete all root access keys.
Issue scoped IAM roles/users for programmatic access.

iam-root-account-used-recently.json.summary: Stop using the root account for day-to-day operations.
steps: Create administrative IAM users/roles and lock away root credentials.

iam-root-account-no-mfa.json.summary: Enable MFA on the root account.
steps: In IAM > My security credentials, assign an MFA device to root.

iam-root-account-no-hardware-mfa.json.summary: Use a hardware MFA device for the root account.
steps: Replace the virtual MFA on root with a hardware MFA device.

iam-password-policy-minimum-length.json.summary: Require a minimum password length of at least 14.
steps: In IAM > Account settings, set minimum password length to 14+.

iam-password-policy-no-expiration.json.summary: Enable password expiration in the account password policy.
steps: Set 'Enable password expiration' to 90 days or fewer.
Set 'Prevent password reuse' to remember the last 24 passwords.

iam-user-with-multiple-access-keys.json.summary: Keep at most one active access key per user.
steps: Deactivate and delete the surplus access key after rotating dependents.
Remove the console password from service users (keep only an access key) or vice-versa.

iam-user-without-mfa.json.summary: Enable MFA for every IAM user with console access.
steps: Assign an MFA device to each console user and enforce MFA via policy.
Create a new key, migrate usage, then delete the old key.
Rewrite the policy to an explicit, least-privilege Action allow-list.

iam-managed-policy-allows-full-privilege.summary: Replace full-admin (*:*) policies with least privilege.
steps: Scope the policy to the specific actions and resources required.
Turn on logging for the trail in all regions.
Enable 'Include global service events' on a multi-region trail.
Turn on log-file integrity validation for the trail.

cloudtrail-no-encryption-with-kms.json.summary: Encrypt CloudTrail logs with a KMS CMK.
steps: Configure the trail to use a customer-managed KMS key.
Create a trail applied to all regions delivering to a secured S3 bucket.
Turn on AWS Config in all regions to record resource configuration.

s3-bucket-world-acl.json.summary: Remove public ACL grants from the bucket.
steps: Enable S3 Block Public Access (account + bucket).
Remove AllUsers/AuthenticatedUsers ACL grants.
Add a bucket policy denying requests where aws:SecureTransport is false.

s3-bucket-no-default-encryption.json.summary: Enable default encryption on the bucket.
steps: Set default SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS on the bucket.
Configure access logging to a dedicated log bucket.
Turn on versioning to protect against overwrite/delete.

ec2-security-group-opens-all-ports-to-al.summary: Remove rules opening all ports to 0.0.0.0/0.
steps: Delete the all-ports/all-sources rule and scope to required ports/CIDRs.

ec2-security-group-opens-known-port-to-a.summary: Restrict sensitive ports (e.g. SSH/RDP) to known sources.
steps: Replace 0.0.0.0/0 on the port with specific CIDRs, or use SSM Session Manager.

ec2-default-security-group-in-use.json.summary: Do not use the default security group.
steps: Move resources to purpose-built least-privilege security groups.

ec2-default-security-group-with-rules.js.summary: Remove all rules from the default security group.
steps: Strip inbound/outbound rules from each VPC's default SG.
Move secrets to SSM Parameter Store or Secrets Manager and reference them at runtime.
Turn on 'EBS encryption by default' in each region.
Snapshot the volume, copy with encryption, and restore from the encrypted snapshot.
Enable flow logs for the VPC/subnet to CloudWatch Logs or S3.

rds-instance-publicly-accessible.json.summary: Disable public accessibility on the RDS instance.
steps: Modify the instance to set 'Publicly accessible' to No and restrict the security group.

kms-cmk-rotation-disabled.json.summary: Enable annual key rotation on customer-managed CMKs.
steps: Turn on automatic key rotation for the CMK.
